title: International Conference on Construction Materials and Environment, 2021 (ICCME 2021)
content: 1st International Conference on Construction Materials and Environment (ICCME - 2021) Jaypee University of Information Technology Waknaghat, Himachal Pradesh Due to Covid-19, conference, ICCME2021 will be an e-conference Important Dates: Conference Date: June 3rd-4th , 2021 Last date for Registration: June 2nd, 2021 and Early Bird Registration: May 31st , 2021 International Conference on Construction Materials and Environment, 2021 (ICCME 2021) The rapid advance of technology brings tremendous change and its impacts are upon every nation in the world. The fourth industrial industry will profoundly alter how things work and Civil Engineering too will advance from the current state. Stakeholders of Civil Engineering such as academicians, researchers, engineers, and policy makers must be ready to adapt and to progress in different mindsets of societies, different engineering method, different demand of infrastructures and different policies. Therefore, Civil Engineering department of JUIT, Waknaghat will hold The First International Conference of Construction Materials and Environment (ICCME) to provide the international platform for professionals of their expertise to share the information about the state of art of Civil Engineering. By having better understanding of the current state and by establishing firm collaboration with each other, Civil Engineering stakeholders will be more prepared to thrive in perpetually progressing civilization. The theme of The First International Conference of Construction, Infrastructure, and Materials is Towards the Future of Civil Engineering Roles to Progressive Infrastructures Worldwide. The prospective participants are welcomed to submit papers with the following subjects: Structural Engineering Building and Construction Materials Geotechnical and Geoenvironmetal Engineering Transportation Engineering Environment Engineering Water Resources Engineering
